mapper.select: select id, template_id, chapter_id, param_code, param_name, param_type, param_value, default_value, cast(option_json as char) as option_json, required_flag, editable_flag, enabled_flag, sort_order, param_desc, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at from t1_dossier_template_param where template_id = #{templateId} order by sort_order asc, created_at asc
mapper.insert:
insert into t1_dossier_template_param (id, template_id, chapter_id, param_code, param_name, param_type, param_value, default_value, option_json, required_flag, editable_flag, enabled_flag, sort_order, param_desc, created_by, updated_by) values
(#{item.id}, #{item.templateId}, #{item.chapterId}, #{item.paramCode}, #{item.paramName}, #{item.paramType}, #{item.paramValue}, #{item.defaultValue}, #{item.optionJson}, #{item.requiredFlag}, #{item.editableFlag}, #{item.enabledFlag}, #{item.sortOrder}, #{item.paramDesc}, #{item.createdBy}, #{item.updatedBy})
mapper.delete:
delete from t1_dossier_template_param where template_id in
#{templateId}
